case_title: CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. INC. VS. SWEET JANE'S, LLC

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 20, 2019. NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE - PER FEB. 26, 2018 ORDER.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: AMANDA MICHAEL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SWEET JANE'S, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-20-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. REPRESENTED BY JOHN COYNE, PRESIDENT DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE TRIAL. APPEARANCE AT THE MAR-20-2019 IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAR-20-2019 HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SWEET JANE'S, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
